ddls:
CREATE TABLE "happiness_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the survey was conducted */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "total_respondents" INTEGER /* Total number of respondents for the survey */,
  "survey_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of survey */,
  "survey_title" TEXT /* Descriptive title for the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended */,
  "total_responses_received" INTEGER /* Total number of responses received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_surveys_survey_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_type_id") REFERENCES surveys_types ("survey_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_surveys_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the country */,
  "healthcare_index" REAL /* Quality of healthcare in the country */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Quality of education in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_levels" (
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness level record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding survey */,
  "very_happy" REAL /* Percentage of respondents reporting very happy */,
  "rather_happy" REAL /* Percentage of respondents reporting rather happy */,
  "not_very_happy" REAL /* Percentage of respondents reporting not very happy */,
  "not_at_all_happy" REAL /* Percentage of respondents reporting not at all happy */,
  "neutral" REAL /* Percentage of respondents reporting neutral */,
  "average_happiness_score" REAL /* Calculated average happiness score */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the happiness scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("happiness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_levels_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES happiness_surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey the respondent participated in */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent within the country */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the respondent */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the respondent */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Self-reported health status of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES happiness_surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the region */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the region */,
  "healthcare_index" REAL /* Quality of healthcare in the region */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Quality of education in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, modify) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "submitted_on" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys_types" (
  "survey_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey type */,
  "survey_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_type_id")
)
